h3389ced1gbbbcg4c6fga02eg5cfc5ee80a64: Hurry, I've got one of those brain things cornered.
h0c84bfe6g2508g4a67g8fcag35ea8110f756: There, in the grass. You can kill it, can't you? Like you killed the others.
h16750e71g6651g4a82g9954g0c3394518d43: *Just a dumb boar. You're relieved, until you see the flash of a dagger.*
h6a966e2bgfd5dg418dga972gdf0bbb211a2c: Put it away. We don't need to fight.
hf83c85aaga627g4c5ega608gef05aa9c0aa7: Don't we? I saw you on the ship - free, scuttling about.
he4153cf9g2e2ag4824ga776gb4f89ee27340: You're in league with them, aren't you? Those tentacled - argh.
hbf79a93egb31fg4fb7g94c6g1bf7b5883240: If this is a robbery, you're off to a bad start, elf.
h1d4570f4g8be6g4f1agb5e8g56f300ea40cb: If this is a robbery, you're off to a bad start, friend.
ha4ce8a9fgb839g45efg9deag40b53bc8ddfc: I just need information. I saw you scuttling about on the ship.
he97563cbg051fg4f3fg96afg9e8e54357b74: One more step and I'll make you eat that knife.
h39851ef1gd5cbg459fga714gc4008bddfbc0: You can try, but first you'll tell me what you know.
h2ca69245g5c09g4261gb0a2g666d45f0e792: I saw you on the ship. You're in league with them, aren't you? Those tentacled - argh.
h3e7f26b7g7780g47fbgaf67g37f7c7026442: Shh. Not a sound. Not if you want to keep that darling neck of yours.
h19e40d0fgd021g42a9gbde6g0e917da9cb40: Now, I saw you on the ship, didn't I? Nod.
h8bd00362g2f64g4c9fg89c9ge65a5c46b2db: And now you're going to tell me exactly what you and those tentacled freaks did to me.
h3c672912g0f8eg4557g9c14gc2b1827fdee9: You have it backwards - they took me prisoner, just like you.
h243c3b98gfb97g46c2ga064g82d3d716d725: Don't lie to me! I - agh.
h93bd3a32gc45cg4ad3g8413g63840f68a5a8: *Your mind twists. You're looking out of unfamiliar eyes, prowling dark, busy streets.*
he3876c08g7528g4874g95fbg23c7d7c76ef3: *You try to hold the memory, but it fades to the worm. The light. The fear.*
h9d8612b6g6d09g4d51g96e1g0f4e808d3453: What was that? What's going on?
h391f8ceag843cg43e0gbcc7ge163a67fc901: It's the mind flayer's worm - it connected us.
ha9563ee6g85aag45bag9622ga747354255df: You're not one of them. They took you, just the same as me.
he9690535g611eg4dc0g94cbg4c2bad7b4246: And to think I was ready to decorate the ground with your innards. Apologies.
h5df45ab1gf313g4791g940agcc3a8eaff159: Apology accepted. I might have done the same were the roles reversed.
ha821b2f9gdd38g4c82ga54bg8f9ab0588c00: My name's Astarion. I was in Baldur's Gate when those beasts snatched me.
ha97dc04fg59f9g4a6fg930egdf9e576c1f80: Is that so? We clearly move in different circles.
h4e94611fg6ba4g4487gb3ddg8e84fe877bc8: So do you know anything about these worms?
h1c681f3eg4c4fg4853ga0cege28bcd45a01c: Yes, unfortunately. They'll turn us into mind flayers.
ha79150a7g1980g4c8ag8e04g9b19213aba7b: Of course it'll turn me into a monster. What else did I expect?
h30eb9b30g38c1g4e9dgb3b2ga57ce1ea1b46: Although it hasn't happened yet. If we can find an expert - someone that can control these things - there might still be time.
h741c620eg9787g4a59g9cc7g05226ccbe90a: Control it? We need to get rid of it.
h195b325ag1d1eg403cg95ebgbc640f885fde: Well yes, of course. But first things first.
hdb56d280g1689g4456gb9b6g8f624434b38d: You should travel with me. Our odds are better together.
hedb66ea1gaac0g46bagac5dgc82fca5d40e3: Forgive me, but are you really in a position to invite people along?
h239194beg6976g412fga73ag144fc267dc26: But if the leader of your little band wants to talk, I'd be happy to hear it.
h6cec4b4fg9477g438fgb3aagf0a38ada0dc0: Tempting, but your party seems a little crowded right now. I like to have my space.
h6aafe0e3g31d9g4cd9g936fgb64ee887d709: You're welcome at my camp, then.
h87e5d38egd141g4492gb145gf6ce26451ae4: I was ready to go this alone, but maybe sticking with the herd isn't a bad idea. Safety in numbers, after all.
h28656f2bg8365g401bg9064g53c22c64a93c: And I hate to turn down an invitation. All right, maybe I'll see you there.
h81e45352g56dfg47adg9b28ge5e9cb4498df: You know, I was ready to go this alone, but maybe sticking with the herd isn't such a bad idea.
he6858455gc2c8g4796g9720gbca617260e85: And anyone that can crash a mind flayer ship and walk away seems like a good person to know.
h9cd6c9b1g2803g4b33g910cg0c034abfd157: All right, I accept. Lead on.
hd2912423g3f3cg46abgaf67g35697b8b9f46: And you seem like a useful person to know.
h81146f04g5120g44d0g97e4g5003961ba505: I need to get moving, but you can shelter at my camp.
h8c0db139g0a77g4b90gb873g7bd1253911fe: I've wasted enough time here. Farewell.
h54df3083g6f0fg4295g868eg25322d0990f6: Wait, that's it? 'You're doomed, sorry', and then off to the next adventure?
he65a39ecg1bf4g444ag95cbg371c09ef2013: These worms are doing something - I can feel it. What are you going to do about it?
h26f56e1eg9b1cg465ag94d0g3d60d5cd7bf8: I'm hunting for a healer. You should do the same.
h3246c6c3gbe27g4211gb04eg9a6eefad11dc: I need to find out more before I let anyone root around in my skull. I'll find an expert.
hab7a24begd39eg4e37ga145g599a35efcbdc: Good luck, I suppose. Here's hoping we're still wearing the same skins when we next meet.
h1368983fgd14cg4f6cgbe5egca082f928b89: I'll figure out my problems, you figure out yours.
h66d54c04g0a1fg403cg83cbg4e74c59266e1: Of course. I'll make my own way.
hed972d8fgcf7ag4afbgb56agd4473b5f7a8a: Well, maybe I'll see you again. Still wearing the same skin, I hope.
h6f5300cdgdecfg47f4gb536g4e0c5e0c1eef: Ask the boar. Maybe he has your answer.
haf12201bg48b4g4ca8g9292g0b90a257a912: I'm not sure yet. Get drunk? Laugh at you? There are plenty of options.
h7b50f6ebgd2c3g4541g8b50g92048d75de89: I know we don't want them in our heads.
h422b85e5g76edg4753gbbc9ga887373a0dd2: No, of that much we can be certain.
h9364e3dbg0ab2g4746g8e77g54c4e50d8ee5: These worms are already affecting me. I can feel it. Now what to do about it...
hcdfb440fg9100g4313g93fcg2a42962e2088: Well, getting out of here, for a start.
hb3e64ba6ge173g486dgaff0g5b56173e1710: Then finding anyone who might know about these worms. I need an expert. Someone who knows how to control these things...
hea44025eg1e8cg4735g8e29gbe2136890828: And I need company for the road. Why not come with me?
h6662e60fg8304g444cg8184g3a5b55b0d267: I need to get moving, but you can shelter at my camp.
hd08da2f9gb7acg49f7gb836g074d3c289864: And you. If we meet again, I hope we're still wearing the right skins.
hb8495e22g1981g4c37g9f31gd8c6c5c3e51b: We can start by travelling together? Better odds, I'd say.
h91289f4eg35e2g4f7cg83d7g4d675ef7038d: Do what you want. I'm leaving.
h944aa6cbgde90g4efdg8160g2c873697ea55: No words of wisdom before you go?
h9be0d0ffgb6b6g43b8ga300g84624e341095: You know as much as I do.
h6aae2754gd9ceg4007g8cceg7b36bd42e0fa: I suppose it's not exactly common knowledge.
hbab7ccd3g08cfg494bgac41g52af2f0c3cf0: Tell him your name and your story.
hb3906731g1b39g4208gb694gdda96f3e80ed: So, did you learn anything about these worms while wandering the ship?
h25ac8218ga4bcg4383g913bg7c7d76be6e72: The strong and silent type? All right.
h68fa06b1gef92g4003g8b21gf2543da84d66: Please tell me you at least know something about these worms.
hcdbd24c1g45cfg4808g9b3dgd6d7bd79fcc9: Glad to see we're all caught up now.
hc9b1a3f6g8988g45f0gbf9fg119ae15325c0: Indeed we are. Please, allow me to introduce myself.
hb2502db1g9858g4923g8cefg383b39b1cc47: You'd better have more to offer than 'apologies'.
h9bab418bg5c83g4f93gab3dgc4a28688600d: I'm out of wine and flowers, so I hope an introduction will suffice.
h738132c2g0fb4g4d98g9bebg5e01b685e892: Put the knife away and we can figure it out.
hd6e699e5g0dc2g4af7ga200g1305d5354f41: How about I keep the knife and you tell me what you know anyway?
h7c4c5b68g2d54g419ag9e40ga4f6ddf9b0e1: What just happened? What was that?
he3b3ce86g17f2g4002ga7adgfc4c85db9351: I saw into your mind. They took you, just the same as me.
hd5af88b8gc936g467eg960fg4fd1b627e30d: A fine effort, but I've seen it all. I was walking this land while your ancestors were learning to crawl.
ha8a2989bgc70fg450ag8a36g2487b7f7a7d3: Now, tell me what just happened! What was that?
h7e6a964ege240g41e6g9b04g774dfb7004dc: We have mind flayer worms in our heads - they connected us.
h7598016ega309g4e18gbe33g3c0d195a2f87: Yes. Yes, that has to be it.
h129d0f2ag8078g48b2gb1d4g988cf55e9c1d: You're not one of them. They took you, same as they took me.
h13e1fb66g3d73g4f27gb5c1ga6b5d4e7de88: I'm half tempted to spill your guts all over the dirt anyway, but for now - apologies.
hbb7b9f36gca56g469cg9b92g095be15fe0ee: We can talk when you stop acting like a paranoid lunatic.
hc831d9c5gfe44g43bcga8f3gd45f834e22fe: Stupid. I saw into your head, you know.
h5f3d8c23g1c89g4a83gaa62g5af4e4078ac1: It sounds like you saw a glimpse of my past. And I saw yours.
ha4bdafc3gc9dcg4fccgbb60g0064f2137d35: A fine effort, but I've seen it all. I was walking this land while your ancestors were learning to crawl.
h7e51f519g45b7g49a4ga6fdgfeec1c370245: Whisper a cantrip to burn his hand.
h3b7ac51fgcc5bg46afg86e1g07bf0600c7d5: A fine effort, but I've seen it all. I was walking this land while your ancestors were learning to crawl.
hc8852528ge989g41a1gbe39g95639afd75cc: Whisper a cantrip to burn his hand.
h9d581b51g390cg45fag8f2ag5043c619ad3f: Whisper a cantrip to burn his hand.
h2193a822g8966g4189gb3d5ge79f5564b8ba: What in the hells are you talking about?
he07ac8fdg1463g4f50ga7dcg198440ee9aeb: Don't play dumb, you little - agh!
hd9a32d97gbfaag499fgaaa3g81ba5606cbf8: Let me go and I might tell you.
h7200c3bcg2846g4abega038g898b76ff5d9f: I'm not here for games, you little - agh!
hf7a14c92g53b8g49f2g9f7bg9d3af6132848: *Your mind twists. You're looking out of unfamiliar eyes, prowling dark, busy streets.*
hf551d06ag3d7eg4e52ga7a3g6d505c295f35: *You try to hold the memory, but it fades to the worm. The light. The fear.*
h34818eacg770ag426dg8022g8f9e51898f02: What was that? What's going on?
ha41a07d4g4965g492bgb065g3a9147e079d5: It's the mind flayer's worm - it connected us.
hacee768cg150ag49e9ga1bdge7529c8bba77: The worm, of course. That explains things. Somewhat.
h5b6842ecgdb7bg4170g9a53g929df43695c7: I don't know, but something just connected us.
h61ea590egc532g4f7cg8d16g45ab43fc81b9: It's those tentacled monsters. Whatever they did to us caused that link.
h8ceabc69gf06cg4426gba35g5dbd2edfe5f1: They took you too. I saw it during... whatever just happened.
h8c87b4b6g896bg43dcg86dfg9b4a67a9c66f: It's those tentacled monsters. Whatever they did - whatever they put in us - just created a connection.
h3da8e47cg5eceg4fb2g9b2dg1bee1339580d: Put the knife away and I'll tell you everything.
hd8a9b1aeg429eg435dg8527gd9c399b39e90: I'm not an idiot. It has to be those tentacled monsters. Something they did...
h9ee40369g7176g478fgb4ceg769fbf046e09: Kill it yourself - you look capable enough.
h448de7efg554fg4051g8315g2ce086bae6ba: I was so hoping for a kind soul. Well, not to worry.
ha949af3cg38f7g47e2ga782g22426ccdf757: Shh, not a word. Let's try to keep that lovely neck of yours in one piece, hmm?
h8491de9eg94b9g43d9gbae7g9b7b5ab812e4: I saw you on the ship, strutting about while I was trapped in that pod.
h5df9f39dgc406g4831g8768g832978993c1a: What did you and those tentacled freaks do to me?
h557fade6g36cdg4be6g99ecg310edfd64364: You have it backwards - they snatched me up too.
h6e9b3fd8gc645g4b12g95efg25edaf62a321: I'm not an idiot. I saw - argh.
h53aad07bg96b2g4455ga0e7g20cebe325213: Put the knife away and maybe we can talk.
h78e3cfcbg9d6bg4de7gb78fge00206a8549a: I haven't done anything to you. Yet.
h2ff8b82bga1d2g4a92g8911g0f1aed8f0e98: All right, we'll do this the old fashioned way.
h53082e19gcb29g40a2g8ef9g8474fdb628ee: Hello again. Still alive, I see.
haf76b0a2gad02g40d6ga640g874cdab9394a: As are you. Perhaps we should travel together.
he2c59297gd961g4450ga398g4b43c7044e86: You should come to my camp. It's safer.
had7b3252g1d0cg42c7g803bgd4e8c35d743c: Well hello. It's nice to see some people are willing to talk, rather than attacking you on sight.
h40aba9c6g02b5g43a6ga6f9g90f01a8400af: It seems we were both passengers on that damned ship. I suppose that merits an introduction, if nothing else.
h4571468fgf817g432bgba83gce03713f0dde: My name's Astarion. I was in Baldur's Gate when they snatched me and put that thing in my head.
haf989f70gb7f1g4ed7ga32ag818b8c552a7c: I - I died. They killed me!
h0cd7c25dg1052g4162gbc1fgb934275fdff7: At least someone had the good grace to bring me back. I suppose that merits an introduction.
h83317bfag2b7ag4467g9fccgf831764088e1: You again? I hope we won't repeat the previous unpleasantness.
h945896c3gfeccg4aa2ga4c4gf88d6f80e80b: How about we try words instead of blades? It's safer for everyone.
h0bf09455g3319g49f6gba8ag838496226727: First you kill me, then you bring me back? You make quite the first impression.
h873df341g9e9bg40d1gad96gb427e471bbcf: They - they killed me! At least you had the good grace to bring me back.
h6c26476dgb476g4477g8b57g6267d17c4f14: You should travel with me. Our odds are better together.
h55e0a712g8709g45a7ga23ag385c6b92ba4c: First you kill me, then you bring me back? What do you want, exactly?
